title: Disease/Disability Information * AIDS/HIV - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Disease/Disability Information * AIDS/HIV 1 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter Children and Youth With Disabilities/Health Conditions AIDS/HIV Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF CAREASSIST Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides assistance paying for insurance premiums, prescriptions, and medical service co-pays. Assists with 100% payments for a limited number of medical services and medications necessary for HIV treatment for uninsured persons. 800 NE Oregon Street #1105 Portland, OR 97232 Eligibility: HIV positive Oregonians with income up to 550% Federal Poverty Level (FPL) Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm by appointment only Email (971) 673-0144 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CAREASSIST CAREASSIST
